title: Generate shared OpenAI metadata projections
action: Implement a dependency-free deterministic renderer/checker with an injectable --root fixture path. It must scan every bee-* directory, require exactly one valid SKILL.md identity source, and treat a bee-* directory or agents/openai.yaml without a valid source skill as an orphan error. For every valid skill, project exactly interface.display_name, interface.short_description, and policy.allow_implicit_invocation: true. Compute display_name by splitting the exact hyphen-case name on `-`, uppercasing the first ASCII letter of every token, and joining tokens with one space (`bee-hive` -> `Bee Hive`, `bee-writing-skills` -> `Bee Writing Skills`). Fold the SKILL.md `>-` description to one-space-separated text for short_description and serialize all projected strings with deterministic JSON-compatible YAML quoting. Generate every declared metadata file, preserve SKILL.md bytes, and reject missing/duplicate keys or unsupported scalar styles rather than guessing.

truths: Every live skills/bee-* directory has agents/openai.yaml
Each projection emits exactly interface.display_name using token title-case (bee-hive -> Bee Hive), interface.short_description using YAML >- folding, and policy.allow_implicit_invocation true
All projected strings use deterministic JSON-compatible YAML quoting so punctuation cannot create keys
Check mode reports exact missing, stale, malformed-source, and orphan/unexpected paths; add/remove/rename fixture cases are covered

artifacts.substantive: dependency-free renderer and --check/--root modes with exact schema, normalization, and orphan detection
representative generated Codex metadata projection whose display_name is Bee Hive

key_links: test_openai_metadata.mjs exercises renderer --check and fixture root modes
onboarding's existing deep mirror includes nested agents/openai.yaml without special cases
prohibitions: No icons, default prompts, MCP dependencies, API keys, or model configuration

trace.outcome: Implemented a strict deterministic SKILL.md-to-OpenAI metadata renderer and generated byte-stable projections for all 15 bee skills.
